# Discover your place in our world-changing work
At Intel, we innovate, we inspire, and we lead by bringing people together from across the globe, united in pushing the boundaries of technology. To us, those boundaries are opportunities. Opportunities to show what we’re capable of. Opportunities to develop life-altering breakthroughs. Opportunities for us to shine, to keep learning, and to further our careers.
Menu

## Love your job. Live your life.
Here, your life-life is just as important as your work-life. A career at Intel comes with benefits and programs that support your physical, mental and financial well-being. In other words, we go all in so you can do the same.
[Company Overview](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/company-overview/company-overview.html)
## [Inclusive, Welcoming Environment We’ve created a place where you can grow and evolve, alongside inspiring teams. Find Community ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/diversity/diversity-at-intel.html) ## [Challenging and Rewarding Work Solve challenging problems and help develop technology that changes the world. Explore Careers ](https://jobs.intel.com/en) ## [Supportive Benefits and Programs Intel offers comprehensive benefits and programs that are designed to take care of you and your family, so you can thrive in every part of your life. Learn Benefits ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/jobs/benefits.html)
## Join Us
What better place to build your future than with the team creating it?
[Search Locations](https://jobs.intel.com/en/locations)
